script: (function(){ var result = {}; result.url = location.url; var allEls = document.querySelectorAll('div, section, span'); var aiArea = []; for (var i = 0; i < allEls.length; i++) { var e = allEls[i]; var txt = (e.innerText||'').trim(); if ((txt.includes('点点') && (txt.includes('AI') || txt.includes('ai'))) || (txt.includes('ai总结') || txt.includes('AI总结'))) { var r = e.getBoundingClientRect(); if (r.width > 50 && r.height > 20) { aiArea.push({ tag: e.tagName, className: (e.className||'').toString().substring(0,120), id: e.id||'', x: Math.round(r.x), y: Math.round(r.y), w: Math.round(r.width), h: Math.round(r.height), text: txt.substring(0,100).replace(/\n/g,' ') }); } } } result.aiElements = aiArea; var filterBtns = []; var filterEls = document.querySelectorAll('[class*="filter"], [class*="Filter"], [class*="screen"], [class*="Screen"]'); for (var j = 0; j < filterEls.length; j++) { var fe = filterEls[j]; var fr = fe.getBoundingClientRect(); if (fr.width > 10 && fr.height > 10) { filterBtns.push({ tag: fe.tagName, className: (fe.className||'').toString().substring(0,120), visible: fr.width > 0 && fr.height > 0, x: Math.round(fr.x), y: Math.round(fr.y), w: Math.round(fr.width), h: Math.round(fr.height), text: (fe.innerText||'').trim().substring(0,30) }); } } result.filterElements = filterBtns; var notes = document.querySelectorAll('section.note-item'); result.firstNoteY = notes.length > 0 ? Math.round(notes[0].getBoundingClientRect().y) : null; result.noteCount = notes.length; return result; })()
